prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting, part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: line/load reversed on GFCI. The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 210.12.
title: Fault diagnosis: GFCI/AFCI function & troubleshooting (residential job)
